isi.lyrics:

Romanization

nammollae seuchyeoganeun nunggil oh wait, no
musimhage jinachyeo wae
anin cheok haedo neon got algedoelgeol

You don’t care about me
soyongeopseo love me
Don’t think you’re hidin’ hidin‘
sumgiryeo hae bwado

Look at me, oh my god!
ajjilhaejin mam
kkeullyeowa whatever

What you gonna do now, baby
nuneul tteji mothage
dagagalge deo
ttokttokhi bwa highlight sign

I Catch you
ppajyeodeul su bakke eopseo neon
soljikhae bwa imi crush in your heart
eojilhae why
Cause I’m a fever for you

I Catch you
ijen beoseonal su eopseo neon
swipge mireonaejin mothae no lie
seontaekhae right
Cause I’m a fever for you
Can never run, baby

hanggeoreum hanggeoreum dagaga josimseureopge
eoneusaengga neon nae ape
naro gadeuk chaewojineun new wave Gotcha!

I want your eyes on me
banjjagyeo Lights on me
Don’t think you’re hidin’ hidin‘
gunggeumhaejijana
gakkai halsurok ppallajineun heart
kkomjjangma whatever

What you gonna do now, baby
nuneul tteji mothage
dagagalge deo
ttokttokhi bwa highlight sign

I Catch you
ppajyeodeul su bakke eopseo neon
soljikhae bwa imi crush in your heart
eojilhae why
Cause I’m a fever for you

replay

dasi ne miso hambeone
I melt I melt

Finally I Catch you
ppajyeodeul su bakke eopseo neon
soljikhae bwa imi crush in your heart
eojilhae why
Cause I’m a fever for you

I Catch you
ijen beoseonal su eopseo neon
swipge mireonaejin mothae no lie
seontaekhae right
Cause I’m a fever for you
Can never run, baby


Hangeul

남몰래 스쳐가는 눈길 oh wait, no
무심하게 지나쳐 왜
아닌 척 해도 넌 곧 알게될걸

You don’t care about me
소용없어 love me
Don’t think you’re hidin’ hidin‘
숨기려 해 봐도

아찔해진 맘
끌려와 whatever

What you gonna do now, baby
눈을 떼지 못하게
다가갈게 더
똑똑히 봐 highlight sign

I Catch you

어질해 why

I Catch you

선택해 right

꼼짝마 whatever

눈을 떼지 못하게
다가갈게 더
똑똑히 봐 highlight sign

I Catch you
빠져들 수 밖에 없어 넌
솔직해 봐 이미 crush in your heart
어질해 why
Cause I’m a fever for you

yeogi jeogi kkallin Copycat, no more wannabes
Me and my girls tonight

Top down, you’re giving me, giving me eyes
Tryna get attention with a bad line
You say I’m Icy - geurae geuge nainggeol

Don’t wanna get down, get down with you
Baby better save it
If you wanna play, you’ll lose (yeah)

Badass
Wanna get, wanna get, wanna get with it
Badass

anincheokhaedo neomuppeonhae Bae
